## Background

A clear and concise description of the existing technical debt and why it was incurred.

## Problem

Describe the concrete drawback(s) this debt causes:
- Makes X harder to maintain because...
- Blocks Y because...
- Creates risk of Z because...

## Proposed Solution

How should the debt be resolved?
